dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Macro flags VIX at 25.83 rising +8.76% as extreme-fear regime that historically overrides ribbon structure on gap-down opens; internals finds only narrow tech leadership (XLK +0.73%) without financials or energy participation — mixed breadth, not a risk-on signal.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: Bullish consensus assumes yesterday's 73c full-body momentum (330k vol close at 681.40) survives the overnight gap-down and VIX spike to 25.83; macro sentiment shifted to EXTREME FEAR overnight and the ribbon is a lagging indicator that can invert within 30 minutes if sellers press at the open.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY breaks below 679.0 on volume > 300k shares — invalidates BULL ribbon thesis entirely; next target Active support 675.63 (4.83 points lower)

primary.condition: if SPY reclaims and holds 681.0 on first RTH test with volume confirmation

secondary.condition: if SPY holds 679.0 on opening weakness but fails to break above 681.0

invalidation.condition: SPY breaks below 679.0 on volume > 300k shares (matching yesterday's final bar momentum)
invalidation.effect: Full bull case collapse — ribbon inversion imminent, macro bears confirmed, Active support 675.63 becomes next target; no bullish entries until price reclaims 679.0 AND XLF joins tech to the upside

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests the 681.0 battle-level resistance within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET); outcome at this level sets the day's directional bias
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not touch 681.00 before 11:00 ET — implies immediate bearish continuation below the open

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains above 23.00 through 13:00 ET, maintaining the HIGH/extreme-fear regime and keeping 0DTE put premium elevated
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 23.00 before 13:00 ET — would collapse the macro bearish case and validate ribbon recovery thesis

swarm_predictions.claim: If SPY fails to hold above 681.0 on its first attempt, the CLEAN_BULL ribbon spread (currently 96c) compresses below 50c by 11:30 ET as macro pressure forces ribbon degradation
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon spread remains above 50c through 11:30 ET even after an initial 681.0 rejection — signals structural bull resilience overriding macro headwinds

synthesis_narrative: The core tension on 2026-03-06 is a structurally bullish ribbon (CLEAN_BULL, 96c spread, two consecutive strong green close bars) colliding head-on with an extreme-fear VIX regime (25.83, rising +8.76% overnight) that drove a 94c gap-down — the market's explicit rejection of yesterday's momentum. Weighted consensus leans bullish (0.60 vs 0.30) but only at moderate strength with two dissenting agents, and all in-play levels are weak 1-star Reference-tier round numbers offering no structural backing. The single most important thing to watch at the open: does 679.0 support hold on the first test — if it fails on volume > 300k shares, the bull case dissolves regardless of ribbon shape and the day's directional trade shifts bearish toward Active support at 675.63.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon 96c spread + price 80c above pivot; overnight gap-down 94c and VIX 25.83 rising dampen conviction — mixed strength vs macro headwinds

macro.one_line: VIX 25.83 HIGH/extreme-fear regime rising +8.76%; SPY gap-down $0.94 confirms risk-off; zero macro events today — pure sentiment-driven selloff

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 681.0 (1-star Reference resistance 0.54 above spot); BULL ribbon intact but all in-play levels are weak round numbers — Active levels (675.63 / 685.51) frame macro range 4.8+ points away

internals.one_line: XLK +0.73% only leader; XLF/XLE flat — narrow tech leadership without broad sector participation signals mixed breadth, not risk-on

validator.top_invalidation: SPY breaks 679.0 on volume > 300k — full bull collapse to Active support 675.63; or VIX drops below 23 within first 30 min — full macro-bear collapse
